stemHtml: SSR works by the transmission of a/an (1) _____ from a/an (2) _____. The reply is on (3) _____ frequency. In some transponders this produces a maximum of (4) _____ codes, and also allows ATC to see the aircraft's altitude based on (5) _____. Select the correct combination to complete this statement.

options.a: (1) interrogation; (2) ground transmitter; (3) a different; (4) 4096; (5) pressure altitude
options.b: (1) pulse pair; (2) ground transmitter; (3) a different; (4) 4096; (5) QNH
options.c: (1) interrogation; (2) aircraft; (3) the same; (4) 7777; (5) pressure altitude
options.d: (1) pulse pair; (2) aircraft; (3) a different; (4) 4096; (5) QNH
